item.title: Submit Game
item.metad: Register Your Game: Share your game details with us. We value your input! Let's get started.
item.content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html class="submitgame" lang="en">

<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>About You</title>
</head>

<body>
    <script>
        // Initialize equipment count
        var equipmentCount = 1;

        // Function to add new equipment fields
        document.getElementById("addEquipment").addEventListener("click", function () {
            var equipmentContainer = document.getElementById("equipment-container");
            var newEquipmentItem = document.createElement("div");
            newEquipmentItem.className = "equipment-item";

            var equipmentNameInput = document.createElement("input");
            equipmentNameInput.type = "text";
            equipmentNameInput.name = "equipmentName";
            equipmentNameInput.placeholder = "Equipment Name";

            var equipmentPriceInput = document.createElement("input");
            equipmentPriceInput.type = "number";
            equipmentPriceInput.name = "equipmentPrice";
            equipmentPriceInput.placeholder = "Equipment Price";

            if (equipmentCount >= 1) {
                var removeButton = document.createElement("button");
                removeButton.type = "button";
                removeButton.textContent = "Remove";
                removeButton.addEventListener("click", function () {
                    removeEquipment(newEquipmentItem);
                });
                newEquipmentItem.appendChild(removeButton);
            }

            newEquipmentItem.appendChild(equipmentNameInput);
            newEquipmentItem.appendChild(equipmentPriceInput);

            equipmentContainer.appendChild(newEquipmentItem);
            equipmentCount++;
        });

        // Function to remove an equipment item
        function removeEquipment(item) {
            var equipmentContainer = document.getElementById("equipment-container");
            equipmentContainer.removeChild(item);
            equipmentCount--;
        }


        // Function to calculate and update total cost and price category
        function updateTotalCostAndCategory() {
            const gameCost = parseFloat(document.getElementById("gamecost").value) || 0;

            // Calculate the total cost, considering game cost and equipment costs
            const equipmentInputs = document.querySelectorAll('input[name="equipmentPrice"]');
            let totalEquipmentCost = 0;
            equipmentInputs.forEach(function (equipmentInput) {
                const equipmentPrice = parseFloat(equipmentInput.value) || 0;
                totalEquipmentCost += equipmentPrice;
            });
            const totalCost = gameCost + totalEquipmentCost;

            // Update the total cost field
            document.getElementById("totalcost").value = totalCost.toFixed(2);

            // Determine the price category
            let priceCategory;
            if (totalCost === 0) {
                priceCategory = 'Free';
            } else if (totalCost < 25) {
                priceCategory = 'Cheap';
            } else if (totalCost > 100) {
                priceCategory = 'Expensive';
            } else {
                priceCategory = 'Affordable';
            }

            // Update the price category field
            document.getElementById("pricecategory").value = priceCategory;
        }

        // Attach the function to cost fields' input events
        document.getElementById("gamecost").addEventListener("input", updateTotalCostAndCategory);
        const equipmentInputs = document.querySelectorAll('input[name="equipmentPrice"]');
        equipmentInputs.forEach(function (equipmentInput) {
            equipmentInput.addEventListener("input", updateTotalCostAndCategory);
        });
    </script>
    <div class="container">
        <form id="myform" action="submit.php" method="POST">
            <h1>Register Your Game</h1>

            <fieldset>
                <legend>Your Details</legend>
                <label for="fname">First Name <span>*</span></label>
                <input type="text" name="fname" id="fname" required/>

                <label for="lname">Last Name <span>*</span></label>
                <input type="text" name="lname" id="lname" required/>

                <label for="email">Email<span>*</span></label>
                <input type="email" name="email" id="email" />

                <label for="gamessubmitted">No. of previous games submitted</label>
                <input type="number" name="gamessubmitted" id="gamessubmitted" min="0" />


                <p class="q1">Have you had any previous experience with games?<span>*</span></p>
                <label for="yes">Yes</label>
                <input type="radio" id="yes" name="experience" value="yes" required />
                <label for="no">No</label>
                <input type="radio" id="no" name="experience" value="no" required />
            </fieldset><br>

            <fieldset>
                <legend>Your Game Details</legend>
                <label for="categoryname">Select Game Category</label><br>
                <select id="categoryname" name="categoryname">
                    <option value="STEM">STEM</option>
                    <option value="Literary">Literary</option>
                </select>

                <label for="gname">Game Name<span>*</span></label>
                <input type="text" name="gname" id="gname" required/>

                <label for="gradelevel">Grade Level<span>*</span></label>
                <input type="text" name="gradelevel" id="gradelevel" required/>

                <label for="review">Review <span>*</span></label>
                <input type="text" name="review" id="review" required/>

                <label for="difficultylevel">Difficulty Level</label>
                <select id="difficultylevel" name="difficultylevel">
                    <option value="Beginner">Beginner</option>
                    <option value="Intermediate">Intermediate</option>
                    <option value="Advanced">Advanced</option>
                </select>

                <label for="internetspeed">Internet Speed</label>
                <input type="text" name="internetspeed" id="internetspeed" />

                <label for="gamepicture">Game Picture URL</label>
                <input type="url" name="gamepicture" id="gamepicture" />

                <label for="url">URL</label>
                <input type="url" name="url" id="url" />

                <label for="gamecost">Game cost<span>*</span></label>
                <input type="number" name="gamecost" id="gamecost" required/>

                <label for="totalcost">Total Cost<span>*</span></label>
                <input type="text" name="totalcost" id="totalcost" readonly />

                <label for="pricecategory">Price Category</label>
                <input type="text" name="pricecategory" id="pricecategory" readonly />


            </fieldset>

            <fieldset>
                <legend>Required Equipment<span>*</span></legend>
                <div id="equipment-container" style="display: flex; flex-direction: column;">
                    <!-- At least one equipment item (without delete option) -->
                    <div class="equipment-item">
                        <input type="text" name="equipmentName" placeholder="Equipment Name" required />
                        <input type="number" name="equipmentPrice" placeholder="Equipment Price" required />
                    </div>
                </div>
                <button type="button" id="addEquipment">Add Equipment</button>
            </fieldset>

            <input type="checkbox" name="termsandconditions" value="YES" id="termsCheckbox" required>
            <label for="termsCheckbox">I have read the terms and conditions</label>

            <div class="submitresetcontainer">
                <button type="submit">Submit</button>
                <input type="reset" value="Reset">
            </div>
            
        </form>
    </div>

    
</body>

</html>
item.author: mac123
